case_title: ELLISION ENTERPRISES USA VS. CAROL WALLACE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF HANNA C. LEUNG IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER THAT SUMMONS BE SERVED BY POSTING PREMISES AND MAILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLISION ENTERPRISES USA
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLISION ENTERPRISES USA AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, CAROL DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION OF SANDY LAU IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER THAT SUMMONS BE SERVED BY POSTING PREMISES AND MAILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLISION ENTERPRISES USA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLISION ENTERPRISES USA AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, CAROL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINUTE ORDER RE: DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT BY POSTING AND MAILING (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLISION ENTERPRISES USA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-21-2025.
